summary: Iteration 43 - Fixed UnboundLocalError in GHL confirm-sale and verified '6 WEEKS CHALLENGE' workflow. All 9 backend tests pass. Frontend UI verified: membership dropdown shows '6 WEEKS CHALLENGE' (not 'CHALENGE'), review auto-enabled with 'challenge' type.

bugs_fixed_by_tester.issue: UnboundLocalError: cannot access local variable 'base_date' when subscription_end_date is provided
bugs_fixed_by_tester.fix: Moved base_date calculation outside of 'if not subscription_end_date' block so it's always defined when creating annual reviews

GET /api/settings/membership-types.verified: 6 WEEKS CHALLENGE exists with member_type='Membres PIF', is_pif=True, duration_days=42

POST /api/members (manual challenge crea.verified: Creating member with '6 WEEKS CHALLENGE' auto-creates: annual_review with type='challenge', review_date=contract_signed_date+42days, transaction in ABONNEMENTS category

POST /api/ghl/confirm-sale (GHL challeng.verified: Confirming Challenge sale creates member, annual_review with type='challenge', transaction, adds to active challenge

GET /api/annual-reviews.verified: Reviews have correct review_type field, filter by type=challenge works

GHL_funnel_section.verified: Acquisition tab shows GHL funnel with correct pipeline data

challenge_auto_review.verified: Selecting 6 WEEKS CHALLENGE auto-enables review switch and sets frequency to 'Challenge (6 semaines)'

critical_code_review_comments: ghl.py: base_date must be defined before the annual_review creation block (lines 273-287) regardless of whether subscription_end_date was provided
seed_data_creation: Test members created and cleaned up during tests (TEST_ prefix)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 43 verified and fixed the '6 WEEKS CHALLENGE' workflow. Key findings: (1) Fixed UnboundLocalError in ghl.py confirm_sale where base_date was undefined when subscription_end_date was provided. (2) Membership type '6 WEEKS CHALLENGE' exists with correct settings (member_type='Membres PIF', is_pif=True, duration_days=42). (3) Manual member creation and GHL confirm-sale both correctly create annual_reviews with type='challenge' and date=contract_signed_date+42days. (4) Frontend MembersPage correctly shows '6 WEEKS CHALLENGE' in dropdown and auto-enables review with 'challenge' frequency when selected. No 'CHALENGE' typo found anywhere.
